query: UPDATE stores SET opening_hours = '{"monday":{"open":"07:00","close":"23:00"},"tuesday":{"open":"07:00","close":"23:00"},"wednesday":{"open":"07:00","close":"23:00"},"thursday":{"open":"07:00","close":"23:00"},"friday":{"open":"07:00","close":"23:30"},"saturday":{"open":"08:00","close":"23:30"},"sunday":{"open":"08:00","close":"22:00"}}' WHERE opening_hours IS NULL;
